titleStmt.title: SII 27.155: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 155. (A.R. No. 269 of 1931-32.) HOSĀḶA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the Jōgi-maṇḍapa in the Chauḷikēri.
This is dated Śaka 1412 (1413 current), Sādhāraṇa, Kārttika śu. 1 corresponding to 1490, A.D., October 14. The details, however, cannot be verified.

It registers a gift of land made for offerings etc., in the maṭha of Anupamanātha-voḍeya, by the five chiefs (ayivaru halaru) of Chauḷiya-kēri. The gift was made over to Subuddhinātha-voḍeya, disciple of Anupamanātha-voḍeya, who also received further gifts of land for offerings to Gōrakanātha (?). It states that Haṁparasa-voḍeya was governing Bārakūru-rājya at the instance of the king's danāyaka whose name, however, is not given. (c.f. Furthers sources, Vol. I, p. 149, Appendix).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . śrī sarasvatyāyē namaḥ .
śrī gurubhyōṁ namaḥ . Avighnamastu . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdra cā
mara jāravē . trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1412 saṁdu sāvirada nānū .
ṟa hadimūṟaneya vartamāna sādhāraṇa saṁvaccharada kārtika śuddha
1lū śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rāja paramēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa narasiṁ
ga rāyamahārāyarū vijayanagariya rājadhāniyali sukhasaṁka
thā vinōdadiṁda samastavaṁrnadharṁmmāśramaṁgaḷanū pratipālisuttaṁ vihakāladalu Ā narasi .
ṁga mahārāyara daṇāykara nirūpadiṁda haṁparasa voḍeyarū bārakūrarā .
jyavanāḷuva kāladalū jauḷiyakēriya voḷage Anupamanātha voḍeyara maṭhakke Anupa .
ma nāthavoḍeyara śiśyasubuddhinātha voḍeyarū bāḷikeya śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare mo .
dalu Anupamanātha voḍeyara maṭhakke Ayivaru halaru dhārāpūrvakavāgi yeṟasi ko .
ṭṭa ṭhāvina catusīmeya vivara mūḍalu cauḷiyakēriya Ayivaru halara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuva .
lu kellaṁgeṟeya dēvaṁṇagaḷa maṭhada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ kāmeyanāykana maṭhada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu
maṭhakke gaḍiyiṁdaṁ vaḷiyamaṭhada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu paḍuvakōla baḷiya gaṇapa seṭi
seṭṭi subuddhinātha voḍeyarige dhāreyaneṟadu koṭṭa ṭhāvinakōlu sahita U yiṁ
tī catusīmeya voḷagaḷa ṭhāvanū Anupamanātha voḍeyara maṭhakke Ayivaru halaru dhārāpūrvakavāgi ye
ṟadu koṭaru mataṁ kaṁdireya Arasutanada kke subuddhinātha voḍeyaranū jive baṁdu karadukoṁ
ḍuhōhāga Ayivaru halaru hogabāradeṁdu nilisi Anupamanātha voḍeyara maṭhada gōrakkanā
thana pādukakke Upārakke Ayivaru halaru koṭṭabāḷike yi catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu ba
ḷiya seṭiya Ayiseṭiyara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu baḷḷiseṭṭiya Aṁṇiseṭṭiyara gaḍiṁ
baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu ce da baḷiyavara hovinahittila gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍa
lu baḍagalu baḷiya seṭṭiya Aṁṇiseṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ bārajara baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīme
voḷage hoṟagāgi ṭhāu maraphalasahita
hovina hittila gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu
gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu śaṁkaradēva voḍeyaru
gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeyavoḷage muṁna
damaged
na baḷi Avara bāḷina yiṁtī catusīmeya voḷaguḷa bayalu
Anupamanātha voḍe gōrakanātana
halara dhārāpūrvakavāgi yeṟadu koṭaru Ayivaru halaravoppa be kara
mahāśrī śrī śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.155 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
